codex_round3_fixes.finding: F-5 (P3, muscle:185) — character_markers provenance only sha-verified the source file but didn't compare the emitted string to the named field, so a fabricated marker pointed at any unchanged file with a matching sha would pass
codex_round3_fixes.fix: agent now (i) parses the source JSON, (ii) reads the value at character_markers_provenance_field (e.g. 'grog_identifiers' in shot_list.json), and (iii) requires cfg['character_markers'] == source[field] verbatim. New statuses CHARACTER_MARKERS_SOURCE_UNPARSEABLE / CHARACTER_MARKERS_FIELD_MISSING / CHARACTER_MARKERS_VALUE_MISMATCH (all exit 11). Verified by inline negative test: fabricating the character_markers string in projects.json reliably triggers CHARACTER_MARKERS_VALUE_MISMATCH.

codex_round2_fixes.finding: F-3 (P3, muscle:173) — marker/style/prompt_rules strings were still trusted from projects.json under a valid slug
codex_round2_fixes.fix: scene_markers + style_anchor + prompt_rules now come straight from ANIM-04-scene-pack-manifest.json (scenes[<scene>].descriptor.prompt + brand_tokens.style_anchor + brand_tokens.prompt_rules). Dropped scene_markers / style_anchor / prompt_rules carry-fields from projects.json. character_markers stays in projects.json (ANIM-03 manifest doesn't have a canonical marker field) but requires character_markers_provenance_source_path + character_markers_provenance_sha256 fields and the agent hashes the source file at runtime and aborts on drift (status CHARACTER_MARKERS_PROVENANCE_DRIFT exit 11). schema_version bumped to 2. Verified: storyboard meta now carries scene_markers_source / style_anchor_source / prompt_rules_source pointing at the manifest fields; character_markers_source records the sha-verified provenance path.

codex_round2_fixes.finding: F-4 (P3, muscle:61) — missing ANIM-03/ANIM-04 manifests returned empty sets so membership checks were conditional, letting OK output emit without authoritative manifests present
codex_round2_fixes.fix: load_ref_pack_manifest() + load_scene_pack_manifest() now return None when the file is missing; build_storyboard() hard-fails immediately with REF_PACK_MANIFEST_MISSING (exit 10) or SCENE_PACK_MANIFEST_MISSING (exit 10) before any marker is read. SCENE_MANIFEST_INCOMPLETE (exit 10) fires if the scene entry exists but is missing descriptor.prompt / brand_tokens.style_anchor / brand_tokens.prompt_rules. Verified via inline negative test: REF_PACK_MANIFEST_MISSING fires when the manifest path is repointed to a non-existent file.

codex_round1_fixes.finding: F-1 (P3, muscle:134) — agent trusted projects.json marker strings without cross-checking against ANIM-03/ANIM-04 manifests
codex_round1_fixes.fix: added load_ref_pack_characters() + load_scene_pack_scenes() readers; build_storyboard() now returns UNKNOWN_CHARACTER (exit 7) or UNKNOWN_SCENE (exit 7) when the project's character/scene slug is not registered in the certed manifests. Marker strings remain verbatim from projects.json (the operator-controlled source-of-truth copy from shot_list.json:grog_identifiers); the cross-check anchors membership to the certed manifests so a project cannot reference a non-existent bible. Verified: load_ref_pack_characters() returns {emma, galinda, grog, lirian}; load_scene_pack_scenes() returns {MagicalRealmPlayground}; grog_playground project passes.

codex_round1_fixes.finding: F-2 (P3, muscle:110) — kontext_prompt_template emitted unresolved {camera_preset} placeholder while needs_fill only listed action
codex_round1_fixes.fix: compile_prompt_template() now takes camera_preset as an arg and interpolates the literal preset string into the template at compile time. Each shot now has its own per-energy template (LOW/MED/HIGH) with {action} as the only unresolved placeholder, matching needs_fill exactly. Verified: shot 5 (verse1, MED energy) template contains the literal 'medium shot, soft push, character framing' and only {action} remains.

test_runs.result: 43 shots over 9 sections; first shot 0.0s, last shot 238.9s; coverage 1.0

test_runs.expected: validation report with shot count + section deltas
test_runs.result: emitted 43 vs gold 38; section_count 9 vs 9; section-boundary deltas all 0.0s (perfect alignment)

verbatim_provenance.principle: P3 + R20 — every brand-token / character-marker / scene-marker / section-table string copied verbatim from on-disk authoritative source.
verbatim_provenance.no_invention_assertion: kontext_prompt_template uses the verbatim character_markers + scene_markers + style_anchor and a literal {action} placeholder. The downstream creative content (action description) is explicitly marked in needs_fill[] for operator/LLM completion in a separate phase. The agent does not generate any prompt body text.

validation_summary.section_boundary_alignment: perfect (max delta 0.000s) because the agent reads the same section table the gold was authored against
validation_summary.shot_count_delta_root_cause: the agent uses equal-width slices at target_shot_seconds=5.5 per section; the hand-authored gold groups by lyric phrasing instead. This is a recorded deterministic-vs-artisanal tradeoff, not a defect; recommended downstream behaviour is to use the emitted skeleton as a starting point and let operator/LLM adjust shot boundaries per lyric phrasing.
validation_summary.lyric_attribution: each emitted shot has 0+ lyric lines whose Whisper start falls inside [shot.start, shot.end). Lines straddling a section boundary (e.g. the first verse-1 line at Whisper-start 11.46 vs section.start 11.5) attach to the prior section; this is the deterministic policy.

doctrine_conformance.P3_no_invention: PASS — kontext_prompt_template stays a literal concat of marker+placeholder+marker+placeholder+marker; needs_fill explicitly enumerates the un-filled fields.
doctrine_conformance.R20_preserve_detail: PASS — lyric.text copied verbatim from lyrics_timestamped.json; markers copied verbatim; section table copied verbatim.
doctrine_conformance.O2_O6_O9: PASS — schema_version present; ISO8601 UTC built_at on all outputs; per-run audit JSONs at apex/audit/anim-13/.
